title: withastro/flue
friendlyTitle: Flue helps developers build sandboxed AI agents
summary: Flue is a TypeScript framework for building autonomous agents and workflows with sessions, tools, skills, instructions, filesystem access, and sandboxed execution.
friendlySummary: Flue is a framework for building AI agents that can use tools, skills, files, and safe execution environments.
whyItMatters: Developers can use it to create agent harnesses that run locally or in hosted environments while keeping execution boundaries and reusable skills explicit.
friendlyWhyItMatters: It gives developers a structured way to build agents that can do real work without giving them unlimited access.
